message:
Add series_drop_duplicates conformance coverage (FP-P2D-119)

- SeriesDropDuplicates enum variant with execution/diff handlers
- Three fixtures: keep_first_strict, keep_last_hardened, keep_none_strict
- Reuses resolve_duplicate_keep() helper

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
